---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ovishkh
---

## ✨ Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## 💡 Motivation
Why do you want this feature? What problem does it solve?

## 📐 Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work. Be as detailed as possible.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions? If so, describe them here.

## 📸 Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add screenshots, mockups, or links to similar implementations.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context or information about the feature request here.
